name: Poppyseed & Nut Filling for Hamantaschen
recipeInstructions:
1. Put washed and drained poppy seeds through finest blade of food chopper.
2. Mix the chopped poppy seeds with rest of ingredients, except vanilla.
3. Cook mixture over slow heat until thick, stirring often.
4. Let mixture cool completely.
5. Add vanilla extract to cooled mixture.
